title: Shiny Pancake Configuration Schema
description: An array of log archiving and rotation rules.

Name.description: Display name of the rule, used in log messages and receipt filenames.

Description.description: Free-text description of the rule. Ignored at runtime.

SourcePath.description: The directory containing log files to process.

DestinationPath.description: The directory where the output ZIP archives will be written.

CleanSourceFiles.description: If true, stages and moves matched files (rotation/cleanup mode). If false, copies matched files (keep mode).

Mandatory.description: If true, logs a critical ERROR (exit code 2) if no files match. If false, logs an INFO message.

FileNamePattern.description: Regular expression pattern (regex) to filter files in the source path. If omitted, all files are processed.

ArchiveNamePrefix.description: Optional prefix prepended to the hostname in the archive name.

ArchiveNameSuffix.description: Optional suffix appended after the date in the archive name.

DateFormat.description: Optional .NET date format string used in the archive name. Defaults to 'dd-MM-yy'.

CompressionLevel.description: 7-Zip compression level (0-9). Defaults to 5 (0 = Store, 9 = Ultra).

ExpectedCompressionPercent.description: Expected size reduction (0-99) used to estimate disk space requirements. E.g. 90 means the archive is expected to be ~10% of the original size. Defaults to 0 (conservative).
